title: narcissus bulbocodium var. nivalis
intro: Narcissus bulbocodium var. nivalis, also known as the winter narcissus or winter aconite, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It is known for its small, white flowers that bloom in late winter and early spring, and have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Narcissus bulbocodium var. nivalis include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
